spec.query:
from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r["_field"] == "temperature" or
    r["_field"] == "pressure" or
    r["_field"] == "motor_speed" or
    r["_field"] == "coolant_temperature"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "process_overview")

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emergency_stop")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "fan_status")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "coolant_temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "coolant_temperature")

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "valve_position")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cooling_alarm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "emergency_stop" or r["_field"] == "cooling_alarm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "temperature")

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pressure")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "pressure")

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "water_level")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "pump_status")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "conveyor_status")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "motor_speed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "motor_speed")

from(bucket: "plc_telemetry")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "plc_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "motor_current")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 2s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "motor_current")
